'''Mugshub''' was the alpha-female of the [[Klagg tribe|Klagg clan]] on [[Pzob/Legends|Pzob]] in [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. She was captured by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] battlemoon the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]'' along with the many [[Gender/Legends|male]] members of her clan.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
